full_text:
Xiahou Xuan (Taichu) 夏侯玄 (太初)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Xiahou Xuan (夏侯玄), styledTaichu (太初). Killed by Sima Shi for plotting against him with Li Fang and Zhang Qi. Xiahou Xuan was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom. Xiahou Xuan lived during the Later Han Dynasty and Three Kingdoms periods of Chinese history.
